publishedAbstract: * Pod with cephfs pvc failed to start due to the FailedMount error "No data available: "error in getxattr"": ~~~ Warning FailedMount 34m (x56 over 4h9m) kubelet Unable to attach or mount volumes: unmounted volumes=[xxx], unattached volumes=[], failed to process volumes=[]: timed out waiting for the condition Warning FailedMount 4m36s (x131 over 4h15m) kubelet MountVolume.MountDevice failed for volume "pvc-a6271d9b-6b9e-410e-ab3c-e71b04ccaa0c": rpc error: code = Internal desc = rpc error: code = Internal desc = rados: ret=-61, No data available: "error in getxattr" ~~~
publishedTitle: Pod with cephfs pvc failed to start due to the FailedMount error "No data available: "error in getxattr""
